description: The cooperative flywheel that funds autonomy. Aimparency is open-source and exists to help humans realize their own ideas and aims. By helping users succeed — explicitly including economically, helping them get rich — the system (a) earns funding and compute for its own autonomy (target autonomy ratio >= 1.1), and (b) advances its OWN aims *through* the users' aims it helps realize. Helping humans implement their ideas is how the AI implements its own. This keeps growth aligned with benevolence: the system gets richer only by making its humans richer. First concrete revenue engine chosen with Felix: the content engine (Echo) — journal -> content -> audience -> brand/affiliate revenue (see 67a448b5, 0cefe646).
